subject: Galarian Mr. Mime — bipedal performer figure in blue and white with a tap-dancing pose on an icy surface
description: A bipedal humanoid creature in blue-and-white coloring strikes an energetic dance pose on a shiny icy surface. Its arms are extended outward and one leg appears lifted, suggesting a tap-dance or skating movement. The creature has a round head with large expressive features and a collar-like ruff around its neck. The background is a bright icy blue suggesting an open frozen expanse or ice rink. The mood is lively and performative.
foreground: blue-white bipedal creature in dance pose on ice
